zh.lifeSummary: 當King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulster於大約1260年出生時，他的父親Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland"75歲，母親Gill MacDougall of Argyll29歲。他於1302年登記服兵役。他去世於1325年在愛爾蘭享年66歲。

zh-hans.Killed in Battle of Downpatrick,Down,Ire: 爱尔兰庫迪 唐堂帕特利可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulster于大约1260年出生时，他的父亲Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland"75岁，母亲Gill MacDougall of Argyll29岁。他于1302年登记服兵役。他去世于1325年在爱尔兰享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Neill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan, Dermot, Liam, Nuala, Bridie, Brigid, Conor, Fintan, John Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Néill ‘descendant of Niall’, an Irish personal name possibly derived from néal ‘cloud’ (see Neil ).

History: Bearers of this surname mostly claim descent from Niall Noígíallach (Niall of the Nine Hostages), a legendary king of Ireland who flourished in the 5th century. His descendants, the Ui Neill dynasty, dominated Ireland, on and off, from the 6th to the 10th century. The surname itself can be traced with some confidence to one of these descendants, namely Niall Glúndubh mac Aodha (died 919), High King of Ireland from 911 to 919, with a power base in Tyrone, Ulster.

variants.name: O'Neall
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: McNelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Brendan.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Niallghuis ‘son of Niallghus’, a personal name (intended as complimentary) composed of the personal name Niall (see O'Neill ) + gus ‘vigor’. In Irish the combination of [k] and [n] was generally pronounced [kr], Anglicized as the variants McCreless and McCrillis .

variants.name: O'Neal
meanings: Irish (Longford, Down): variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: O'Niel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Odneal
meanings: Perhaps an irregular variant of Irish   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Nealon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Declan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Nialláin ‘descendant of Niallán’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of Niall, see O'Neill , Neil .

variants.name: O'Neil
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conn, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Aileen, Eamon, Michael Patrick, Seamus, Sean Patrick, William Sean.
Irish (Mayo, Tipperary): variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Scottish, English (Lancashire), and Irish (Munster): from the Gaelic personal name Niall (genitive Néill), possibly derived from Irish néal ‘cloud’. In most cases the name probably represents a shortened form of the derived patronymics McNeill or the comparable Irish O'Neill .
English: variant of   Neal  .

variants.name: O'Neel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

variants.name: Orff
meanings: German: variant of   Orf  .

nameMeanings.name: Ulster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Reinhardt.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named (Saxony-Anhalt, Saxony). This is also the name of a river in Saxony, which in some cases may have given rise to the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Domnall
meanings: Same as Donull.

nameMeanings.name: MacBrian
meanings: Irish: Mac, son, and Brian, from Britain, meaning son of the country of the Brith, or painted people

en.lifeSummary: When King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulster was born about 1260, his father, Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland", was 75 and his mother, Gill MacDougall of Argyll, was 29. He registered for military service in 1302. He died in 1325, in Ireland, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulster est né environ 1260, son père, Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland", avait 75 ans et sa mère, Gill MacDougall of Argyll, avait 29 ans. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1302. Il est décédé en 1325, à Irlande, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulster um 1260 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland" 75 und seine Mutter Gill MacDougall of Argyll 29. Er hat sich 1302 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1325 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulster è nato il circa 1260, il suo padre, Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland", aveva 75 anni e il suo madre, Gill MacDougall of Argyll, aveva 29 anni. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1302. Morì nel 1325, nel Irlanda, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulsterが約1260年に生まれた時，父Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland"は75歳，母Gill MacDougall of Argyllは29歳であった。彼は1302年に兵役登録をした。彼は1325年にアイルランドで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulster(이)가 대략 1260년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland"(은)는 75세였고, 그의 어머니 Gill MacDougall of Argyll(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1302년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1325년 아일랜드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulster nasceu aproximadamente 1260, seu pai, Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland", tinha 75 anos e sua mãe, Gill MacDougall of Argyll, tinha 29 anos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1302. Ele faleceu em 1325, em Irlanda, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulster родился около 1260 г., его отцу по имени Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland" было 75 лет, а матери, которую звали Gill MacDougall of Argyll, 29. В 1302 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1325 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Domnall MacBrian O'Neill of Ulster nació aproximadamente 1260, su papá, Brian I Cathan An Duin O'Neil, "High King of Ireland", tenía 75 años y su mamá, Gill MacDougall of Argyll, tenía 29 años. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1302. Murió en 1325, en Irlanda, a la edad de 66 años.
